title: hieracium murorum subsp. osmundaceum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. osmundaceum, also known as Hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and minor infections. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting potential antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Hawkweed is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
